2026-04-15T14:23:49.2738661Z description: |
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2777109Z   Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2778011Z   Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2778829Z   predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2779619Z   analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2780721Z   Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2781222Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2781388Z on:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2781733Z   issues:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2782110Z     types: [opened]
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2782500Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2782906Z     inputs:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2783260Z       issue_number:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2783903Z         description: "Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)"
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2784638Z         required: true
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2785038Z         type: string
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2785439Z   roles: all
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2785809Z   reaction: eyes
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2786033Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2786208Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2786463Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2786634Z network:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2786986Z   allowed:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2787352Z     - defaults
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2787751Z     - "api.nuget.org"
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2787995Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2788157Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2788572Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2789142Z   add-labels:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2789520Z     max: 7
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2793403Z     target: "*"
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2793849Z   remove-labels:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2794251Z     max: 7
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2794620Z     target: "*"
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2795012Z   add-comment:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2795392Z     max: 2
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2795748Z     target: "*"
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2796142Z   assign-to-user:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2796525Z     max: 1
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2796894Z     target: "*"
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2797281Z   close-issue:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2797644Z     max: 1
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2798008Z     target: "*"
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2798373Z   noop:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2798772Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2799209Z   jobs:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2799563Z     mention_owners:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2800863Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2801894Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2802384Z       output: "Owner mention comment posted"
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2802901Z       permissions:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2803306Z         issues: write
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2803716Z       inputs:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2804082Z         message:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2804668Z           description: "The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols"
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2805355Z           required: true
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2805778Z           type: string
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2806179Z         owners:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2807037Z           description: "Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')"
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2808252Z           required: true
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2808687Z           type: string
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2809200Z       steps:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2809595Z         - name: Post mention comment
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2810297Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2810785Z           env:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2811344Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2812008Z           with:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2812397Z             script: |
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2812820Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2813390Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2813813Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2814016Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2814755Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2815498Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2816007Z                 }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2816540Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2817270Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2817840Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2818278Z                 }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2818671Z                 return null;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2819094Z               }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2819319Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2819543Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2850651Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2851269Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2851641Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2851834Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2853265Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2854629Z                 return;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2855154Z               }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2855386Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2855599Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2856197Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2856759Z                 try {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2857212Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2857816Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2858392Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2858897Z                   });
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2859363Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2875136Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2876481Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2877419Z                   });
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2877855Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2878512Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2879150Z                 }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2879548Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2900362Z               }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2900635Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2900848Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2901405Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2901986Z                 return;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2902378Z               }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2902816Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2903499Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2904124Z                 return;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2904524Z               }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2904742Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2904929Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2905576Z               try {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2906158Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2906973Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2907648Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2908341Z                 return;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2908743Z               }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2908961Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2909233Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2910329Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2910918Z                 return;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2911318Z               }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2911532Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2911914Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2912666Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2913329Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2913950Z                 return;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2914370Z               }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2914592Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2914790Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2915501Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2916346Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2917000Z                   return;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2917444Z                 }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2917668Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2917863Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2918425Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2918904Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2919397Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2920099Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2920633Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2921257Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2923589Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2924328Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2924833Z                   })
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2925247Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2925568Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2925764Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2926424Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2927085Z                   return;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2927504Z                 }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2927727Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2927926Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2928496Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2929090Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2929424Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2929582Z                 try {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2930335Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2930963Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2931506Z                     body
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2931918Z                   });
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2932608Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2933397Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2934081Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2934785Z                   return;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2935198Z                 }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2935571Z               }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2935787Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2935944Z tools:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2936303Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2936670Z   github:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2937044Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2937746Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2938487Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2939284Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2940071Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2940336Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2940513Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2940910Z ---

2026-04-15T14:23:49.2961781Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2962211Z   jobs:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2962565Z     mention_owners:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2963485Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2964500Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2964985Z       output: "Owner mention comment posted"
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2965500Z       permissions:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2965886Z         issues: write
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2966286Z       inputs:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2966649Z         message:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2967220Z           description: "The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols"
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2967896Z           required: true
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2968314Z           type: string
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2968711Z         owners:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2969546Z           description: "Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')"
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2970656Z           required: true
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2971083Z           type: string
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2971582Z       steps:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2971992Z         - name: Post mention comment
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2972593Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2973082Z           env:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2973654Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2974317Z           with:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2974694Z             script: |
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2975114Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2975688Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2976210Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2976419Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2977148Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2977884Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2978400Z                 }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2978934Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2979655Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2980409Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2980849Z                 }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2981244Z                 return null;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2981659Z               }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2981881Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2982112Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2982695Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2983247Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2983603Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2983792Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2985152Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2986490Z                 return;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2986892Z               }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2987109Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2987326Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2987919Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2988493Z                 try {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2988944Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2989538Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2990276Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2990813Z                   });
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2991285Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2991894Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2993050Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2993950Z                   });
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2994374Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2995023Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2995658Z                 }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2996059Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2996542Z               }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2996761Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2996960Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2997498Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2998071Z                 return;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2998472Z               }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2998890Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.2999549Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3000365Z                 return;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3000776Z               }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3000994Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3001177Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3001620Z               try {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3002274Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3002940Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3003711Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3004400Z                 return;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3004797Z               }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3005019Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3005294Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3005983Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3006557Z                 return;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3006959Z               }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3007172Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3007537Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3008260Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3008868Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3009479Z                 return;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3010057Z               }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3010276Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3010475Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3011168Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3011990Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3012613Z                   return;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3013025Z                 }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3013243Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3013441Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3013952Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3014427Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3014907Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3015396Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3015915Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3016528Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3017222Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3017901Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3018395Z                   })
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3018811Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3019120Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3019312Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3020111Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3020755Z                   return;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3021158Z                 }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3021384Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3021575Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3022146Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3022722Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3023052Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3023217Z                 try {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3023691Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3024297Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3024835Z                     body
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3025246Z                   });
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3025947Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3026751Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3027429Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3028141Z                   return;
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3028558Z                 }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3028924Z               }
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3029143Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3029309Z tools:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3029661Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3030224Z   github:
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3030600Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3031127Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3031947Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3032726Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3033321Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3033577Z 
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3033765Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3034340Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3035034Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (6762 chars):
2026-04-15T14:23:49.3067188Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues\n  Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,\n  predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides\n  analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links\n  Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository\n\non:\n  issues:\n    types: [opened]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      issue_number:\n        description: \"Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)\"\n        required: true\n        type: string\n  roles: all\n  reaction: eyes\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork:\n  allowed:\n    - defaults\n    - \"api.nuget.org\"\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  add-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  remove-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  add-comment:\n    max: 2\n    target: \"*\"\n  assign-to-user:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  close-issue:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    mention_owners:\n      description: \"Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      output: \"Owner mention comment posted\"\n      permissions:\n        issues: write\n      inputs:\n        message:\n          description: \"The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n        owners:\n          description: \"Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n      steps:\n        - name: Post mention comment\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const fs = require('fs');\n              const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;\n\n              function resolveIssueNumber() {\n                if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {\n                  return context.issue.number;\n                }\n                const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);\n                if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {\n                  return parsed;\n                }\n                return null;\n              }\n\n              const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();\n              const owner = context.repo.owner;\n              const repo = context.repo.repo;\n\n              if (issueNumber === null) {\n                core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              async function failSafe(reason) {\n                core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.addLabels({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    labels: ['needs-team-triage']\n                  });\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'\n                  });\n                } catch (recoveryError) {\n                  core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);\n                }\n                core.setFailed(reason);\n              }\n\n              if (!outputFile) {\n                await failSafe('No agent output path provided');\n                return;\n              }\n              if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {\n                await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              let agentOutput;\n              try {\n                agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));\n              } catch (parseError) {\n                await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {\n                await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');\n              if (items.length === 0) {\n                await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              for (const item of items) {\n                if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {\n                  await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const mentions = item.owners\n                  .split(/[\\s,]+/)\n                  .map(s => s.trim())\n                  .filter(Boolean)\n                  .map(raw => {\n                    const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\\\?@/, '');\n                    if (/\\r|\\n/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    return `@${normalized}`;\n                  })\n                  .filter(Boolean);\n\n                if (mentions.length === 0) {\n                  await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const body = item.message\n                  ? `${item.message}\\n\\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`\n                  : mentions.join(' ');\n\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body\n                  });\n                  core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);\n                } catch (apiError) {\n                  await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);\n                  return;\n                }\n              }\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues]\n    # Triage must read issues from all users, including external\n    # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the\n    # auto-applied \"approved\" policy filters them out via DIFC\n    min-integrity: none\n\ntimeout-minutes: 10"}
